facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this one on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. ZEN Spa & Nail sits at 91/3 and the locals keep it that way. 4.7 stars across 450 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency. Nails, massage, the works. Book before your beach day, not after. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Hands getting a full treatment at ZEN Spa & Nail, Duong Dong. 4.7 stars. 450 reviews. The tourists outside have no idea this place exists. Walk in, thank yourself later.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about ZEN Spa & Nail. 4.7 stars, 450 reviews, Duong Dong. You're welcome. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Nails done. Shoulders unknotted. ZEN Spa & Nail, Duong Dong. The spot locals kept quiet.
